title: scutellaria orientalis subsp. virens
intro: Scutellaria orientalis subsp. virens, also known as Chinese skullcap, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria orientalis subsp. virens include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and enhancing cognitive function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
